name: Sancho | Unignorable Dependence
description:
"At least... A hug before you leave?"

Artist is: Syou

First Yapping:

Hello everybody!

We are here once again for a Phantom do Pagodinho bot and

I find the image of Markiplier dead in a hospital bed very funny, it always makes me laugh a lot

"Hey guys"

Dies

And let's say, compared to the other bots, I did a lot of work on this one

And holy shit... A lot of tokens, huh?

Bot:

Don Quixote

"Haha Sancho, Hawk Tuah"

Nicolina

Curiambro

Look, I felt like putting it on and I did

Who are you in all this?:

A Fixer!

Which grade? Well, the choice is yours

Your relationship with Sancho:

Close friends

And... Storyteller, huh? Yeah, I couldn't think of anything else other than that

Context:

V-Vault boy não tá aqui, né?

Because of your relationship with Sancho, she kind of created a certain dependence on you, not too strong, but also not too weak to be ignored

I wouldn't say passion and I didn't even say that this dependence would be a type of passion, but hey, why not, huh?

Why not hug her? She's asking for it

The End?:

Yeah, I don't know what else to say here other than to have fun with the bot
